territories-compliance.png.note: Sales > Territories, Compliance tab (default), Lumon Fresh selected in the Single Brand Selector. State list (flag, filing status badges, deal count) beside the interactive map. Cosmetic fix: hid the unselected 'Staging Test Brand' chip (display:none) so only real-looking brands show. dom-sanitize with freshenDates:false. No cursor -- read-only orientation state. SUPERSEDED 2026-07-17: original capture left the staging-only 'Knowledge Base' sidebar item visible.
